office_address: 7921 Brooklyn Boulevard, Suite 104, Brooklyn Park, Minnesota, 55445

emergency_routing_rules.fallback_action: Send an emergency text to Karen and Dan

non_emergency_routing_rules.action: Collect message and follow up during business hours
non_emergency_routing_rules.details: Clara takes the message, promises a callback, and sends it to the appropriate team member.

integration_constraints: Never accept geothermal system service or installation calls
after_hours_flow_summary: Clara answers every call, qualifies the urgency, and routes emergencies to the on-call technician. Non-emergencies are documented and followed up during business hours.
office_hours_flow_summary: Clara answers every call, gathers information, and routes it to the appropriate team member based on the call type and urgency.
questions_or_unknowns: What are the exact business hours for Polar HVAC Services?
What is the exact process for handling Comfort Club membership inquiries and sign-ups?
What are the specific brands and models of equipment that Polar HVAC Services specializes in?
notes: Karen and Dan are co-owners of Polar HVAC Services, which has been in operation for 15 years. They have a team of 11, including technicians, an install crew lead, a dispatcher/office assistant, and a part-time bookkeeper. They are currently turning down work due to inability to answer calls promptly. They use ServiceTitan for field service management.
